page_metadata.bioconda__summary: Fast implementation of the neighbour-joining phylogenetic inference method.
page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Fast implementation of the neighbour-joining phylogenetic inference method
page_metadata.biotools__summary: QuickTree is an efficient implementation of the Neighbor-Joining algorithm (PMID: 3447015), capable of reconstructing phylogenies from huge alignments in time less than the age of the universe.
page_metadata.galaxy__bio_tools_summary: QuickTree is an efficient implementation of the Neighbor-Joining algorithm (PMID: 3447015), capable of reconstructing phylogenies from huge alignments in time less than the age of the universe.
